description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.5 Docker image for all jobs and runs a global before_script that creates a deps directory and sets GOPATH to $(pwd)/deps. Define stages build and test. In the build stage add a compile-go-1.5 job that runs `go get -v -d` then `go build`. Also add a format job that runs `go get golang.org/x/tools/cmd/goimports` and checks formatting with `(if [ "$(bin/goimports -d .)" == "" ]; then echo "Good format"; else echo "Bad format"; exit 33; fi)` and the same check for `*.go`. Add a vet job that runs `go tool vet -composites=false .` and `go tool vet -composites=false -shadow=true *.go`, and publishes the botbrother directory as untracked artifacts. In the test stage add a test-go-1.5 job that runs `go get -v -d` then `go test -race -p 1 -cover .` and does not allow failure.
